raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX AGENT ORDERED A XXXX XXXX  ONLINE FOR ME, WHEN DELIVERED TO THEIR LOCATION, I FOUND THAT THEY SENT A WRONG ONE, SO I REFUNDED AT THE XXXX XXXX STORE ON XX/XX/XXXX. 
I WAIT ONE WEEK AND HOME DEPOT CREDIT CARD DID NOT CREDITED TO MY ACCOUNT, I SPOKE THREE TIMES AT STORE TO THEM AND NO SOLUTION, I OPENED A CASE WITH XXXX XXXX. TODAY I SPOKE TO HOME DEPOT CREDIT CARD DEPARTMENT AND SAID I HAVE TO UP TO 90 DAYS MORE. 
ORDER # XXXX RECEIPT # XXXX XXXX REFUND DATE XX/XX/XXXX AT XXXX XXXX  AT XXXX XXXX TEXAS STORE XXXX XXXX XXXX # XXXX
